Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint To Change The Amount Of Damages
Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint To Change The Amount Of Damages.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
